nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain after 5am. Cloudy, with a low around 37. Southeast wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and patchy fog before 8am, then rain and patchy fog and a slight chance of thunderstorms between 8am and 11am, then rain likely and a chance of thunderstorms and patchy fog. Cloudy, with a high near 62. Southeast wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between three quarters and one inch possible.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain before 11pm, then rain and patchy fog. Cloudy. Low around 40, with temperatures rising to around 54 overnight. South wind 15 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 64 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 45. West wind around 16 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
